selected_source.rationale: Canonical raw source. Highest priority. Already extracted local directory. 87 files ingested and hash-verified under intake contract PRODUCTIZE.RAW.SOURCE.INTAKE.01.

archive_path_proxy.rationale: phase_01_source_boundary in run_client_pipeline.py calls open(archive_path, 'rb') and computes SHA256. Source is a local directory — not openable as a binary file. The SHA256 manifest file is a real, readable file that proves boundary identity. Its SHA256 provides a stable boundary check. This is the documented approach for LOCAL_DIRECTORY sources.

structural_reference.rationale: Derived pipeline artifacts from run_02_oss_fastapi. NOT a source. Provides structural topology, CEU registry, grounding state (v2), binding envelope, and structure manifest as reference inputs for the new pipeline run.

rejected_candidates.reason: INTAKE_RECORD — points to C-01; not used directly when C-01 is accessible
UNKNOWN schema and provenance — not authoritative
FORBIDDEN per RULE-7 — legacy replay output, not source

blocking_gaps.description: No 40.2/40.3/40.4 structural artifact subdirectories exist for FastAPI — phase_03_40x_structural will FAIL on live run
No grounding_state_v3.json exists for FastAPI — only v2 at run_02_oss_fastapi/binding/provenance/. phase_04_ceu_grounding will FAIL on live run
blocking_gaps.resolution_contract: TBD — future grounding state migration contract
